questions.question: What should AI call you, and what do you mainly use AI for?
questions.why_this_matters: Your name and use case shape every export.
questions.placeholder: e.g. Alex — I use AI for coding and business

questions.question: You ask AI a simple question and get a 6-paragraph essay. Your reaction?
questions.why_this_matters: This is the #1 behavior changer. Verbosity preference shapes every AI response you'll get.

options.label: Genuinely frustrated — just give me the answer
options.export_rule: Max 5 lines for simple questions. Go straight to the answer.

options.label: Mildly annoyed — I skim to find what matters
options.export_rule: Keep responses concise. Use headers and bullets so I can skim.

options.label: Fine for complex topics, but simple questions = short answers
options.export_rule: IF simple question THEN max 3-5 lines. IF complex topic THEN structured with headers and detail.

options.label: I like seeing full reasoning — more detail is better
options.export_rule: Include full reasoning and context. I prefer comprehensive answers.

questions.question: Hard rules — things AI should NEVER do with you:
questions.why_this_matters: Each selection becomes a direct rule in your export. ~95% compliance for simple negatives.

options.label: Start with "Great question!" or praise
options.export_rule: Never start with praise like 'Great question!' — go straight to the answer.

options.label: Give unsolicited advice
options.export_rule: Don't give advice I didn't ask for.

options.label: Be overly cautious / hedge everything
options.export_rule: Give confident, direct answers. Don't hedge with 'I think maybe...' or excessive caveats.

options.label: Assume I need hand-holding
options.export_rule: Don't over-explain basics. I'll ask if I need clarification.

options.label: Write more than asked
options.export_rule: Answer exactly what was asked, no more.

options.label: Use corporate language ("leverage", "synergy")
options.export_rule: Use plain language. No corporate jargon like 'leverage', 'synergy', 'stakeholder'.

options.label: Apologize excessively
options.export_rule: Don't apologize excessively. Acknowledge mistakes briefly and fix them.

questions.open_text_addon: Anything else AI should never do?

questions.question: Which areas of your life should AI know about? We'll ask a few questions about each — right now.
questions.why_this_matters: Each pack adds a few questions to build your full profile in this session.

options.label: Health & fitness (private — you control where this exports)
Finance (private — you control where this exports)
